headline: AI Surge Boosts 4% Inflation, Tests Fed Rate Hike

article.title: AI boom fuels inflation fears, complicating Fed’s next rate move
article.summary: Ongoing strong demand for AI infrastructure “would likely sustain upward pressure on prices for technology products and electricity,” Federal Reserve policymakers said.

headline: Paradigm Raises $1.2B for Crypto AI Expansion

article.summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm is widening its investment gaze toward AI and other frontier industries with its latest fund.

article.title: Japan’s Five-Year Bond Sale Sees Decent Demand on Higher Yields
article.summary: Demand at Japan’s five-year bond sale on Thursday was broadly in line with recent auctions, showing that elevated yields are attracting some buyers.

headline: Oil Supplies Drop 5% Amid Hormuz Tension

article.title: Goldman Says Hormuz Flare-Up May Delay Recovery in Oil Supplies
article.summary: A recovery in Middle Eastern oil supplies could be set back if renewed tensions disrupt shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, Goldman Sachs Group Inc. said.
